stemHtml: For an airport located in British Isles, the passage of a warm front will usually be indicated by:

options.a: a fall in temperature, rise in dew point temperature, wind backing and decreasing.
options.b: rise in temperature, rise in dew point temperature, wind veering and decreases.
options.c: rapid improvement in visibility, pressure falling rapidly, wind veering and increasing.
options.d: rise in temperature, rapid rise in pressure, wind backs and becomes gusty.
